query: hey i want to add some animations to my landing page, it's a SaaS product and right now everything just sits there statically. can you make the hero section come alive with a nice entrance animation?

my react app uses framer motion but the hero heading animation feels choppy and the exit transition is broken. can you help me fix and improve it?
how do i make buttons feel more tactile and bouncy in my web app? the whole site feels a bit dead right now
i need to convert these CSS keyframe animations to GSAP — we're moving from a CSS-only approach to gsap for better control. here's the current code
add scroll-triggered section reveals to my marketing site. each section should fade up as the user scrolls past. I'm already using tailwind
what's the best way to animate a drawer opening in vue 3? i want it to feel smooth and physical
my gsap animations look janky on mobile because they're animating 'left' and 'top' properties. can you tell me what properties are safe to animate for performance?
make this navbar sticky and add a subtle scroll animation where it shrinks slightly when the user scrolls down
what are the most modern 2026 animation patterns for web? i want to make my site feel current
can you write a python script to parse all the URLs from this sitemap.xml and check which ones return 404?
i need to add form validation to my checkout page — when the user submits with missing fields, highlight the inputs in red and show error messages
how do i set up a cron job in node.js to run a database cleanup task every night at 2am?
can you help me write CSS to center a div both vertically and horizontally? nothing complex, just the standard flexbox approach
audit my website animations — i want to know if they're causing performance issues and if there are any conflicts
i want to enhance this page's animations — it has some basic hover transitions but i need you to also fix the issues and add more advanced effects
my react app has a loading spinner that needs to rotate. just a simple css animation or a one-liner would be fine
set up webpack bundling for my vanilla JS project — i need code splitting and tree shaking for production
i'm building a dashboard with charts — what's the best library for animated data visualizations in 2026?
write a typescript interface for a user object with id, name, email, and role fields
